name: Processes Accessing the Microphone and Webcam
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
SIGMA Title: Processes Accessing the Microphone and Webcam
SIGMA Description: Potential adversaries accessing the microphone and webcam in an endpoint.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('4657', '4656', '4663')) AND (LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\software\microsoft\windows\currentversion\capabilityaccessmanager\consentstore\microphone\nonpackaged%' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\software\microsoft\windows\currentversion\capabilityaccessmanager\consentstore\webcam\nonpackaged%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Processes Accessing the Microphone and Webcam on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('4657', '4656', '4663')) AND (LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\software\microsoft\windows\currentversion\capabilityaccessmanager\consentstore\microphone\nonpackaged%' OR LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\software\microsoft\windows\currentversion\capabilityaccessmanager\consentstore\webcam\nonpackaged%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Processes Accessing the Microphone and Webcam
